name: Complianz
description: Complianz — WordPress GDPR and cookie compliance plugin with geo-targeted consent banners and automatic cookie scanning.

seo.title: Complianz — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Complianz: Complianz — WordPress GDPR and cookie compliance plugin with geo-targeted consent banners and automatic cookie scanning.

when_to_use: GDPR cookie consent banner for WordPress sites
Auto cookie scanning and categorization on page load
Geo-targeted consent mode for EU vs non-EU visitors
Consent proof storage for GDPR audit compliance
IAB TCF 2.0 CMP integration for publisher ad stacks

pros: Native WordPress plugin — no account or external script
Strong documentation oriented to non-technical site owners
Free tier covers basic GDPR for small sites
cons: Cookie scan depth can miss SPA and dynamic injections
Premium tiers needed for multi-region and documents
Consent log retention limited versus dedicated CMPs
review.verdict: Best-in-class WordPress privacy plugin — pick it if your site is WP, skip it otherwise.
review.best_for: WordPress site owners who need GDPR compliance without a developer
review.not_for: Non-WordPress stacks or publishers needing IAB TCF support
